examples: This diabolical agent had the divine permission, for a season, to burrow into the clergyman's intimacy, and plot against his soul.
It was a diabolical error, a schoolboy error.
Mr. SEGELL: So it has this very spooky, diabolical, seductive quality that seems to hit all saxophonists.
To Monique Doll, Keyes was a Dr. Jekyll-Mr. Hyde personality, but she saw only the diabolical side.
